reasoning: The Lean signature faithfully captures the informal statement. `CofiniteTopology X` in Mathlib (Topology/Constructions.lean) is defined as the type synonym whose open sets are the empty set plus sets with finite complements — exactly Munkres' finite complement topology. The `[Infinite X]` type class corresponds to "X is an infinite set". Asserting `IsConnected (Set.univ : Set (CofiniteTopology X))` is the standard way to express "the space X (with cofinite topology) is connected" — it is logically equivalent to `ConnectedSpace (CofiniteTopology X)` (cf. `connectedSpace_iff_univ`), and requires both non-emptiness (automatic from `Infinite X`) and preconnectedness of the whole space. Hypothesis, conclusion, and underlying types all match.
